goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
The train should 'arrive by 10:45' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from peterborough
The train should arrive by 10:45 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get departure time and price
